zh.lifeSummary: 當Andrew Luttrell於大約1498年出生在英國薩默塞特登斯特時，他的父親Hugh Luttrell44歲，母親Margaret Hill31歲。他於1514年4月22日與Lady Margaret Wyndham在英國英格蘭薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1538年5月4日在英國英格蘭薩默塞特登斯特享年41歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Andrew Luttrell于大约1498年出生在英国薩默塞特登斯特时，他的父亲Hugh Luttrell44岁，母亲Margaret Hill31岁。他于1514年4月22日与Lady Margaret Wyndham在英国英格兰薩默塞特结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1538年5月4日在英国英格兰薩默塞特登斯特享年41岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Luttrell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): from a diminutive of Old French loutre ‘otter’ (from Latin lutra), applied as a nickname for someone thought to resemble an otter, or a metonymic occupational name for someone who hunted otters (for their pelts). Compare Luter and Litteral .

variants.name: Luter
meanings: from Old French loutre ‘otter’, either used as a nickname, or alternatively as a metonymic occupational name to denote an otter hunter.

nameMeanings.name: Andrew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Greek name Andreas, a short form of any of various compound names derived from andr- ‘man, warrior’. In the New Testament this is the name of the first disciple to be called by Jesus. After the Resurrection, St Andrew preached in Asia Minor and Greece. He is traditionally believed to have been crucified at Patras in Achaia. He was one of the most popular saints of the Middle Ages and was adopted as the patron of Scotland, Russia, and Greece. It has long been among the most popular boys' names in the English-speaking world, especially in Scotland. Its popularity in England was further enhanced by its use as a British royal name for Prince Andrew ( b. 1960 ), the Duke of York.

en.lifeSummary: When Andrew Luttrell was born about 1498, in Dunster, Somerset, England, his father, Hugh Luttrell, was 44 and his mother, Margaret Hill, was 31. He married Lady Margaret Wyndham on 22 April 1514, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 4 May 1538, in Dunster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 41, and was buried in Church, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Andrew Luttrell est né environ 1498, à Dunster, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Hugh Luttrell, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Margaret Hill, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margaret Wyndham le 22 avril 1514, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 4 mai 1538, à Dunster, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterré à Church, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Andrew Luttrell um 1498 in Dunster, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh Luttrell 44 und seine Mutter Margaret Hill 31. Er hat am 22. April 1514 in Somerset, England, United Kingdom Lady Margaret Wyndham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 4. Mai 1538 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Dunster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Church, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Andrew Luttrell è nato il circa 1498 nel Dunster, Somerset, England, il suo padre, Hugh Luttrell, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Hill, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Lady Margaret Wyndham il 22 aprile 1514, nel Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 4 maggio 1538, nel Dunster, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolto a Church, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Andrew Luttrellが約1498年にイギリスソメルセトダンスターで生まれた時，父Hugh Luttrellは44歳，母Margaret Hillは31歳であった。1514年4月22日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトでLady Margaret Wyndhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1538年5月4日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトダンスターで41歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトチャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Andrew Luttrell(이)가 대략 1498년 영국 서머세트 던스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh Luttrell(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Hill(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1514년 4월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 Lady Margaret Wyndham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1538년 5월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 던스터에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Andrew Luttrell nasceu aproximadamente 1498, em Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh Luttrell, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Hill, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Margaret Wyndham em 22 de abril de 1514, em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de maio de 1538, em Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 41 anos, e foi sepultado em Church, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Andrew Luttrell родился около 1498 г. в местности дунстир, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh Luttrell было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Hill, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret Wyndham 22 апреля 1514 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 4 мая 1538 г. в местности дунстир, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 41 год и был похоронен в местности чурч, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Andrew Luttrell nació aproximadamente 1498, en Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh Luttrell, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Margaret Hill, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Lady Margaret Wyndham el 22 de abril de 1514, en Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 4 de mayo de 1538, en Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultado en Church, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
